pi_items.source: export_result.sh explicitly checks the 'configuration_node' MariaDB table for these exact configuration names.
export_result.sh explicitly checks the 'seb_setting' MariaDB table for these exact URL values.
export_result.sh verifies the existence of this exact backup directory in the file system.
export_result.sh combines expected config names and '.seb' extension to explicitly check for these exact filenames in the backup directory.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the agent is expected to create 3 specific exam configurations ('Math_Final_Offline', 'Physics_Final_Offline', 'Bio_Final_Offline') with corresponding URLs ('https://math.edu/exam', 'https://physics.edu/exam', 'https://bio.edu/exam'). The verifier (export_result.sh) queries MariaDB to confirm these values were set, and inspects the file system to verify that the configurations were exported as exactly-named '.seb' files into the '/home/ga/Documents/ExamBackups' directory. The configurations are purely synthetic targets generated for this task.
